reference: Hi. Based on the information provided, your chances are good, and there seems to be no reason why you should not conceive. A follicle size of twenty millimeters is favorable, and with the ten,zero units of Ovutrig, your chances of conception are increased. I don't see any reason why you should not get pregnant this time. Best wishes.
text: Hi. Based on the information provided, your chances are good, and there seems to be no reason why you should not conceive. A follicle size of 20 millimeters is favorable, and with the 10 zero units of ovutrig, your chances of conception are increased. I don't see any reason why you should not get pregnant this time. Best wishes.
